productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this synthetic leather designer shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperGlossy Synthetic leather upper with perforations on the forefoot for absolute comfort and styleConcealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitSuede inner lining on the backfoot for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleLeather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves for absolute grip on smooth surfacesCurved midfoot and mildly raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
